name: Golang Custom
author: antigravity@google.com
description: Custom Golang egg for running Go apps with optimization and support for running, stopping, and restarting.
startup: if [ -f go.mod ]; then go mod tidy; fi; if [ -f ${MAIN_FILE} ]; then go build -o app ${MAIN_FILE} && ./app; else ./app; fi
